issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases.
The skill is specific to React Three Fiber and may not work with other AI agent platforms.

scenarios.name: Interactive GLTF product viewer with hover state
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the documented R3F declarative patterns (`<Canvas>`, `useGLTF` from drei, `useGLTF.preload`, `onPointerOver`/`onClick`, `useFrame`) while baseline falls back to imperative Three.js with manual GLTFLoader and requestAnimationFrame.

scenarios.name: Animated 5000-star particle field that drifts toward the pointer
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses `<InstancedMesh>`/`<Instances>` plus `useFrame` with `state.pointer` and `viewport` per the skill's instancing guidance, while baseline naively creates thousands of individual meshes and uses a manual animation loop.
